storyboard.content: I'm having extremely bad pain in my right testicle that started all of a sudden.
My right testicle looks swollen and has shifted to a weird position that doesn't look normal.
I feel very sick to my stomach and I've already thrown up twice.
This all started suddenly about 2 hours ago and it has not let up at all.
The pain is a 9 out of 10. It's constant, not coming and going in waves, and I can't find any position that helps.
Nothing I've tried makes the pain any better and it is not getting better on its own.
I'm a 16-year-old male with no prior health problems.
